%

    \begin{tasks}(2)
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                (5x+1)^2
                 & = (5x)^2 + 2\cdot 5x \cdot 1 + 1^2 \\
                 & = 25x^2 + 10x + 1
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                (2x-3)^2
                 & = (2x)^2 - 2\cdot 2x \cdot 3 + 3^2 \\
                 & = 4x^2 - 12x + 9
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                (4a-3)(4a+3)
                 & = (4a)^2 - 3^2 \\
                 & = 16a^2 - 9
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                (4x+2)^2
                 & = (4x)^2 + 2\cdot 4x \cdot 2 + 2^2 \\
                 & = 16x^2 + 16x + 4
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                (2x-2)(2x+2)
                 & = (2x)^2 - 2^2 \\
                 & = 4x^2 - 4
            \end{aligned}$
        \task
        $\begin{aligned}[t]
                (3x-2)^2
                 & = (3x)^2 - 2\cdot 3x\cdot 2+2^2 \\
                 & = 9x^2 - 12x + 4
            \end{aligned}$
    \end{tasks}
